comments.body: Don't merge. Added a bad commit but want to let it run to test.
@vrothberg Could you squash your commits.  "m" is a very informative commit message, but I have a `Q` about it.  :^)

> @vrothberg Could you squash your commits. "m" is a very informative commit message, but I have a `Q` about it. :^)

he, I noticed too but want to wait and see if that turns tests green.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
LGTM assuming happy tests and @mheon's comment is addressed
The BATS failure is an Ubuntu bug: they forked their own BATS and broke it. I've filed an [Ubuntu bug](https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/bats/+bug/1882542)
bindings failed. I'm assuming it's a flake. Restarted.
